vibe: Objective, rigid, functional. Terminal/Retro-Futurism aesthetic. High-end editorial tech style.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing. 'Control Room' grid for dashboards.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-column. Gap: tight (gap-4 or gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.borders: Visible borders everywhere (Grid Borders style). Expose the skeleton.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow, sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).

surfaces.headers_nav: Solid background with hard bottom border. No glassmorphism (keep it brutalist).
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-white/10). Hover: border color darkens/lightens, slight shadow.
surfaces.buttons: Square edges, solid fill for primary, transparent with 1px border for secondary.

motion_interactions.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7].
motion_interactions.animations: Minimalist. Micro-interactions for feedback. Entrance animations (staggered) for lists.

icons_assets.library: lucide-react, react-icons/si (for provider logos like OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama), phosphor-icons

login_bg.description: High-contrast, Swiss brutalist abstract data visualization, dark mode

empty_state_bg.description: Monochrome brutalist grid pattern, dark mode, futuristic terminal aesthetic
empty_state_bg.placement: Empty state backgrounds for data tables or workspace browser

component_guidelines.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized: rounded-none, primary color #002FA7, hover #002585, text-white. No soft rounded corners.
component_guidelines.inputs: Shadcn Input heavily customized: bg-[#0A0A0A], border border-white/10, focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#002FA7] rounded-none.
component_guidelines.cards: Shadcn Card heavily customized: rounded-none, border-white/10, bg-[#141414].
component_guidelines.data_display: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts with monochrome color scheme + single accent color.
component_guidelines.chat_interface: Message bubbles: User messages have stark border and accent color bg. Agent messages have dark gray bg.
component_guidelines.markdown_viewer: Use react-markdown. Syntax highlighting in dark theme. IBM Plex Mono for code blocks. Stark borders around pre/code blocks.

specific_pages.chat_agent: Split screen layout. Chat on the left (w-1/3 or w-1/2), Wiki/Source context on the right.
specific_pages.wiki_browser: Sidebar file tree. Main content area displaying markdown. Dense, technical typography.
specific_pages.source_ingestion: Drag and drop zone with dashed border, brutalist styling. Status indicators for ingestion progress.
specific_pages.activity_log: High density table (Shadcn Table) with monospace typography for tokens and logs.
specific_pages.admin_dashboard: Bento grid for API keys, providers. Strict rectangular layout.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme and Swiss brutalist aesthetic. Do NOT use soft shadows, large border radii, or generic gradients.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the stark #0A0A0A and #141414 backgrounds.
Use react-icons/si for API provider logos (e.g., SiOpenai, SiAnthropic).
Apply `data-testid` to all forms, inputs, buttons, and critical UI components.
For the Login page, use the `login_bg` image as a full-bleed background with an overlay `bg-black/80` or `bg-black/60` to ensure the stark form is legible.
Keep spacing generous but layout strict. Grids should feel like a 'Control Room'.
